name: start-override-vs-absent
description: Three num instances sharing an abstractNum. numId=1 (no override), numId=2 (startOverride=1), numId=3 (no override). Tests that startOverride correctly resets, and separate num instances have independent counters.
expected_behavior: numId=1: 1., 2., 3. numId=2: 1., 2. (restarted by startOverride). numId=3: 1., 2. (fresh counter for different numId).
